case_title: WEBB CORP. vs. SCHNEIDER, GRADY N. et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEBB CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT SCHNEIDER, GRADY N.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEBB CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT SCHNEIDER, GRADY N. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEBB CORP. SERVED OCT-28-1995, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SCHNEIDER, GRADY N.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEBB CORP. SERVED OCT-28-1995, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT SCHNEIDER, GRADY N.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WEBB CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SCHNEIDER, GRADY N. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: RESTORED TO PLAINTIFF ON 11/12/95 $926.40 RENT, $184.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,110.90, LEASE FORFEITED
DECLARATION IN LIEU OF PERSONAL TESTIMONY FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEBB CORP.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WEBB CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SCHNEIDER, GRADY N. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 275 ELLSWORTH ST, LEASE FORFEITED, CLERK'S NOTATION RENDERED ON ORIGINAL LEASE- CRC 522
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $33.70 FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEBB CORP.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SCHNEIDER, GRADY N.

AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $184.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $1,500.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEBB CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT SCHNEIDER, GRADY N.
